hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | { read -r f; if echo "$f" | grep -q '\.mq5$'; then DIR=/Users/vasileiosvou/Downloads/root; cd "$DIR"; git rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1 || git init; git add *.mq5 2>/dev/null || true; git diff --cached --quiet 2>/dev/null || git commit -m "Auto-save: $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')"; git remote get-url origin >/dev/null 2>&1 && git push origin HEAD 2>/dev/null || true; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true
